context.summary: Make an emotion badge that expresses how you feel in sounds as well as pictures.
how_it_works: The micro:bit with built-in speaker can play new expressive sounds. This project plays a happy sound when you press input button A to match the happy icon on the LED display output.
It plays a sad sound when you press button B to match the sad face icon.
When you press the touch logo, it plays the 'spring' sound to match the surprised face on the LED display.
improve_it: Experiment with the different new expressive sounds like 'giggle', 'hello' and 'twinkle'.
Modify the program with different emotion icons, or draw your own.
Add an animation to go with each expression.
